name: SF Agent Script Assist
description: In-process Agent Script authoring companion — parse, compile, and code-action feedback on every .agent write

docs.summary: Advisory diagnostics for `.agent` files: vendored SDK parses + compiles after every write/edit and appends LSP-style feedback into the tool result.
safety: Stays silent on unsupported files and on failed write/edit results.
Never overrides the built-in write/edit tools.
